creator: pete_g23@hotmail.com
text:
I am using xfree86 version 4.1 and am having problems installing gdm.  When doing
a make under /usr/ports/x11/gdm, a bunch of errors come up.  Some of the first are, X11/Xlib.h: No such file or directory and then, X11/Xutil.h: No such file or directory.  Then there are
a bunch of syntax errors, for example: /usr/X11R6/include/gtk12/gdk/gdkprivate.h:64: syntax error before 'Window.'  Then there are a bunch
of gmake errors as well as Error 1 & 2.  Then it stops in /usr/ports/graphics/imlib and the rest of the way down.
When I download the .tar.gz file and "unpack" it and run sh ./configure, I get the following error: configure: error: Couldn't find the gnomeConf.sh file that is generated by gnome-libs install.
